
❯ Using the Bash tool, run
  exactly: echo GO &&
  sleep 25 && echo END

● Bash(echo GO && sleep 25
      && echo END)
  ⎿  GO
     (6s · timeout 30s)
     (ctrl+b to run in
     background)

✢ Skedaddling… (9s)
  ⎿  Tip: Press Shift+Enter
     to send a multi-line
     message

───────────────────────────
❯
───────────────────────────
  …/scratchpad/fs-spike-…
  ← for agents
